view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step to validate the requirement of a 'Simple online booking page' is supported by the evidence of a customer successfully booking an appointment. The booking details confirm that clients can see available slots, select a time, and complete the payment process, which aligns with the requirement. Specifically, the evidence from the 'customer-book-primary' step shows a confirmed booking with all necessary details, indicating that the booking page functionality is operational and meets the specified need.
